items.title: Boston Celtics cap situation after declining Amari Williams and Max Shulga. Both can be brought back on two-ways.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Boston Celtics cap situation after declining Amari Williams and Max Shulga. Both can be brought back on two-ways.

Dalano Banton remains on a non-guaranteed salary.

Neemias Queta and Jordan Walsh become extension-eligible starting on July 6.

items.title: JUST IN: Boston Celtics center Amari Williams has agreed to a deal to return to the Celtics, league sources told HoopsHype. Williams appeared in 22 games for Boston last season. He’s represented by agent George S. Langberg of GSL Sports Group.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: Boston Celtics center Amari Williams has agreed to a deal to return to the Celtics, league sources told HoopsHype. Williams appeared in 22 games for Boston last season. He’s represented by agent George S. Langberg of GSL Sports Group.
